title: On finitely generated left nilpotent braces
author_string: Meng, Hangyang, Ballester‐Bolinches, Adolfo, Kurdachenko, Leonid A., Pérez‐Calabuig, Vicent
journal: Transactions of the London Mathematical Society
abstract:
Abstract
                  A description of finitely generated left nilpotent braces of class at most two is presented in this paper. The description heavily depends on the fact that if  is left nilpotent of class at most 2, that is , then  is right nilpotent of class at most 3, that is . In addition, we construct a free object in the category of finitely generated left nilpotent braces of class at most 2.
